# Foblex Flow

> Canonical documentation and product site for Foblex Flow, an Angular-native node-based UI library.

Use canonical URLs on `https://flow.foblex.com/` instead of mirrors or historical copies.

Main entry points:
- Docs: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/intro
- Get Started: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/get-started
- Examples: https://flow.foblex.com/examples/overview
- Showcase: https://flow.foblex.com/showcase/overview
- Articles: https://flow.foblex.com/blog/overview

Key product pages:
- Angular node-based UI library: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/angular-node-based-ui-library
- Angular node editor library: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/angular-node-editor-library
- Angular workflow builder: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/angular-workflow-builder
- Angular diagram library: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/angular-diagram-library
- React Flow comparison for Angular teams: https://flow.foblex.com/docs/react-flow-vs-foblex-flow-for-angular-teams

Package and source:
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@foblex/flow
- GitHub: https://github.com/Foblex/f-flow

Reference demos:
- AI low-code platform: https://flow.foblex.com/examples/ai-low-code-platform
- Database flow manager: https://flow.foblex.com/examples/f-db-management-flow
- UML diagram example: https://flow.foblex.com/examples/uml-diagram-example
